title: Crypto-backed candidates notch wins in three US state primaries
summary: The crypto-aligned Fairshake PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $8 million on media to support candidates in Maryland, New York and Utah amid pushback from many criticizing “crypto billionaires.”

title: Bitcoin falls under $60K, but traders anticipate 15% bounce
summary: Bitcoin price dropped below $60,000 for the first time in weeks, but data shows traders betting on a relief bounce.

title: Ex-Tricolor COO to Plead Guilty to Fraud in Firm’s Collapse
summary: Former Tricolor Holdings Chief Operating Officer David Goodgame told a judge that he will plead guilty to fraud charges stemming from the used-car dealer and lender’s collapse last year.

title: Chipmakers Fall Anew in Run-Up to Micron’s Results: Markets Wrap
summary: A drop in chipmakers ahead of Micron Technology Inc.’s earnings weighed on stocks, with the results expected to provide clues on whether this year’s artificial-intelligence rally will be justified.

title: Binance Withdraws MiCA License Application in Greece, Leaving EU Users in Limbo
summary: Crypto exchange Binance formally withdrew its MiCA license application in Greece, one week after a report said it would be denied.

title: Fake Crypto Influencer Gets 15 Months for $1.4M Telegram Staking Fraud
summary: Noman Saleem impersonated crypto influencers on Telegram, luring victims into a fake staking scheme before vanishing with their funds.

title: a16z CSX-backed Cambrian raises $6 million seed to build blockchain data oracle network
summary: Cambrian, a startup building blockchain data infrastructure for institutions and AI agents, raised $6 million in a seed funding round.

title: Prediction market polls find US voters prefer federal rules over state patchwork
summary: The CFTC has been locked in a tug-of-war with states over who has the ultimate authority over event contracts.

title: Venezuela to reveal $240bn debt pile in world’s largest restructuring
summary: Caracas to disclose it has much more borrowing than expected after overthrow of Maduro

title: Is this teenage girl North Korea’s next dictator?
summary: Emergence of Kim Jong Un’s daughter at many public events fuels speculation that she is being lined up as a leader
